body:
Codex post-exec review: **NEEDS CORRECTION**.

Formal GitHub review is blocked for this auth path (`Resource not accessible by integration`), so recording the verdict here.

Reviewed commit: `a531d60edab9bc989887201008efefc380e35e27`
Review packet: `ai_handoffs/NEWPROJECT-SAVE-WIRING_REVIEW_2026-06-01_14-07-17+0300.md`
Sidecar: `ai_handoffs/NEWPROJECT-SAVE-WIRING_REVIEW_2026-06-01_14-07-17+0300.meta.json`

Blocking correction items are docs-only:
1. `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/save_request.rs:29` still says Save-As to a new `.rge-project` tree is a follow-up, but this PR ships it via `Ctrl+Shift+S`.
2. `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs:469-470` still says successful Save-As always produces `SaveSource::Scene`, but `Ctrl+Shift+S` now commits `SaveSource::Project`.

Behavioral review notes:
- The new wiring, binary-owned seams, `Ctrl+Shift+S` decode, success adoption, failure no-ops, and existing Ctrl+S behavior look correct.
- Local focused checks passed: `cargo test --jobs 1 -p rge-editor-shell --lib save_as -- --nocapture`, `cargo test --jobs 1 -p rge-editor-shell --test keyboard_command_bus_round_trip ctrl_shift_bindings_today -- --nocapture`, `cargo check --jobs 1 -p rge-editor-shell --all-targets`, and `cargo check --jobs 1 -p rge-editor --all-targets`.
- PR CI is green, including architecture lints, workspace tests, and script-bench compile.

Recommended correction: update those two doc blocks to distinguish Ctrl+S no-source `.rge-scene` Save-As from Ctrl+Shift+S new-project Save-As, then rerun the focused checks/gate and re-file EXEC.

Codex correction re-review: **APPROVED for closeout**.

Reviewed commit: `fc8f0023d4c3b8cb1b1bad91c27579af5bdb4cd4`
Review packet: `ai_handoffs/NEWPROJECT-SAVE-WIRING_REVIEW_2026-06-01_18-01-50+0300.md`
Sidecar: `ai_handoffs/NEWPROJECT-SAVE-WIRING_REVIEW_2026-06-01_18-01-50+0300.meta.json`

Correction result:
- The two docs-only stale-prose findings from the prior review are fixed.
- The in-family `rge-scene-loader` stale doc was also corrected, so the feature docs now consistently distinguish Ctrl+S no-source `.rge-scene` Save-As from Ctrl+Shift+S new-project Save-As.
- The correction delta is docs-only: 3 files, `+10 / -6`, 0 `Cargo.toml`.

Verification:
- Local focused checks passed: `cargo test --jobs 1 -p rge-editor-shell --lib save_as -- --nocapture`, `cargo test --jobs 1 -p rge-editor-shell --test keyboard_command_bus_round_trip ctrl_shift_bindings_today -- --nocapture`, `cargo check --jobs 1 -p rge-editor-shell --all-targets`, and `cargo check --jobs 1 -p rge-editor --all-targets`.
- Local canonical gate passed on the PR worktree with `RUST_TEST_THREADS=2`.
- GitHub Actions are all green for `fc8f002`, including workspace tests and script-bench compile.

No remaining `Needs Correction` items. Merge remains gated on explicit human authorization.
